notes: v0.3.74: Auto-fallback to WASAPI when ASIO enumeration returns 0 devices. Root cause is in cpal-asio's Stream::drop (only removes callbacks, doesn't unload the driver) so after preview, Focusrite stays loaded in cpal's global state and the next enumeration hits 'driver already exists' → 0 devices. No retry duration fixes that. Now JamSync transparently switches to WASAPI default in/out so the session connects regardless. Underlying ASIO bug fixed properly later in cpal-fork.
